title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Kale Consultants. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
